error_page_default_title: This page could not finish loading.
error_page_default_description: An unexpected issue interrupted the page before it was fully ready.
error_page_default_suggestion: Go back to the previous page, then try the last action again.
error_page_sign_in_required_title: Please sign in again to continue to this page.
error_page_sign_in_required_description: The page is available, but the current session needs to be refreshed before it can open.
error_page_sign_in_required_suggestion: Return to a safe page, sign in again, and continue from there.
error_page_access_blocked_title: This page is not available with the current account.
error_page_access_blocked_description: The app reached the resource, but this account does not currently have the required access.
error_page_access_blocked_suggestion: Switch to an account with access, or contact an administrator if you need it.
error_page_route_missing_title: This address does not point to an available page.
error_page_route_missing_description: The address may be outdated, typed incorrectly, or mapped to a page that has already moved.
error_page_route_missing_suggestion: Double-check the address or jump back to a known location.
error_page_server_fault_title: The page could not finish loading.
error_page_server_fault_description: The request reached the service, but an upstream issue prevented the page from recovering.
error_page_server_fault_suggestion: Try again. If it keeps happening, check the backend or server logs.
error_page_missing_route_message: This address is not mapped to an available route.
